Interface McpSyncRequestContext

All Superinterfaces:
McpRequestContextTypes<io.modelcontextprotocol.server.McpSyncServerExchange>
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultMcpSyncRequestContext
public interface McpSyncRequestContext extends McpRequestContextTypes<io.modelcontextprotocol.server.McpSyncServerExchange>
Author:
Christian Tzolov, Sebastien Deleuze
